ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of dataset (e.g., climate, ecology) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset version */,
  "readme_file" TEXT /* Path to the readme file for the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES dataset_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comparisons" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison */,
  "dataset1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first dataset being compared */,
  "dataset2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second dataset being compared */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used for the comparison */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the comparison */,
  "q_value" REAL /* q-value of the comparison */,
  "beta_value" REAL /* beta-value of the comparison */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comparison was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comparison was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparisons_dataset2_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset2_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparisons_dataset1_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset1_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comparison_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comparison the result belongs to */,
  "local_overlap" REAL /* Local overlap value of the comparison */,
  "regional_overlap" REAL /* Regional overlap value of the comparison */,
  "homogeneity" REAL /* Homogeneity value of the comparison */,
  "turnover_comp" REAL /* Turnover composition value of the comparison */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparison_results_comparison_id FOREIGN KEY ("comparison_id") REFERENCES comparisons ("comparison_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of what changed in this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the version was uploaded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
